home.welcome: Welcome to my portfolio! I'm a developer passionate about building modern web applications.
home.name: Wali Sylla
home.description: I'm Wali, a full-stack developer passionate about web application development and new technologies. My curiosity and eagerness to learn drive me to see every project through with precision. Thanks to my diverse experiences (professional, athletic, etc.) and my adaptability, I easily integrate into a team and fully commit to challenges and goals.

diploma.title: Diploma
diploma.name: Web and Mobile Application Designer Developer

items.level: technical documentation comprehension, intermediate oral expression

skills.title: My Skills
skills.intro: My previous experiences have allowed me to develop cross-functional skills and great adaptability. Autonomous and rigorous, I know how to face challenges efficiently. Additionally, my various continuing education programs have allowed me to acquire and refine technical skills, here's an overview:

projects.title: Projects

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.description: This portfolio — designed and built from scratch with Next.js 15, React 19, CSS Modules and next-i18next. Single-page architecture, light/dark theme, bilingual FR/EN.

esse.name: ESSE Association Website
esse.description: Showcase website for ESSE association, built as a freelance project. Next.js 15, Sanity CMS, Framer Motion. 7 content schemas, client trained on CMS, SEO optimized.

lasauce.name: La Sauce
lasauce.description: Fullstack platform connecting associations with individuals. Team project (3 devs, 10 days). React, Redux, Node.js, Express, MongoDB.

weatherapp.name: WeatherApp
weatherapp.description: Fullstack weather app. City-based weather lookup via third-party API. Vanilla JavaScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB.

projects.sectionDescription: Here's a selection of projects I've worked on. Feel free to click on the links to learn more!
projects.categoriesTitle: Browse my projects organized by technologies

htmlCss.title: HTML/CSS
htmlCss.description: Projects built with core web technologies: HTML5 and CSS3. These projects focus on semantic structure and responsive design.

jsVanilla.title: Vanilla JavaScript
jsVanilla.description: Applications developed in pure JavaScript, without frameworks. These projects demonstrate my mastery of language fundamentals and DOM manipulation.

react.title: React
react.description: Modern web applications built with React. These projects illustrate my ability to create interactive and performant user interfaces.

reactNative.title: React Native
reactNative.description: Cross-platform mobile applications developed with React Native. These projects showcase my expertise in mobile development.

ohmyfood.name: OhMyFood
ohmyfood.description: Online food ordering website, designed with Sass for better CSS organization and animations managed via @keyframes.

kanap.name: Kanap
kanap.description: Online store specialized in sofa sales.

laPanthere.name: La Panthère
laPanthere.description: Web design agency, for this site my work consisted of optimizing natural referencing (SEO), for better online visibility.

tickethack.name: Tickethack
tickethack.description: Train ticket booking site, implementation of key features such as cart management (add, delete, save).

weatherapp.name: WeatherApp
weatherapp.description: FullStack: Weather website, allowing you to check the weather of any city using an API.

lasauce.name: La Sauce
lasauce.description: Website created in 10 days with a team of 3 student developers. La Sauce is a platform connecting associations and individuals.

mymoviz.name: My Moviz
mymoviz.description: Website allowing you to display the latest movies using The Movie Database API with the possibility of adding movies to your wishlist, with a view counter and allows you to rate each movie.

noProjects.message: No projects available in this category at the moment.

missions.title: Open Graph Prerender Server
missions.description: Autonomous development of a Node.js/Express server dynamically generating sharing metadata (Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp) for 5 content types. Modular architecture, detection of 15+ bot types, XSS security, SQL optimization and complete README documentation. Ready for NGINX + Alibaba Cloud deployment.

missions.title: Data Extraction & Migration
missions.description: Complete extraction of a 48-column table from a 9.3 MB SQL dump under WSL2/MySQL. Usable CSV delivered in 3 hours in an emergency situation.

items.description: Design and development of the ESSE association showcase website using Next.js 15, Sanity CMS and Framer Motion. Creation of 7 complex content schemas and client training for CMS autonomy. Optimized SEO, smooth animations, responsive.
Skill development in Vue.js 3 in a professional context. Interface component development, existing code analysis and application of best practices.

12 years managing multi-partner projects, team management and coordinator supervision. Communication with diverse audiences, budget management. Skills directly transferable to development: autonomy, rigor, documentation, teamwork.
